response:
Nurse Emily has organized a creative writing workshop for 24 residents, dividing them into 4 groups of 6 each. Each group will receive 3 writing prompts initially, totaling $4 \times 3 = 12$ prompts. Emily also prepares an additional set of 10 prompts to be shared equally among all groups, which means each group gets $10 \div 4 = 2.5$ prompts. Since prompts must be whole numbers, we round up to ensure fairness. Thus, each group receives 3 additional prompts, resulting in $4 \times 3 = 12$ extra prompts.

In total, Emily needs $12 + 12 = 24$ writing prompts for the session. The library provides a source for inspiration, and the library also offers a variety of resources that support the creative process. The library is an essential resource for Emily to draw from when preparing the prompts.

The END.
